options.text: Can you summarize the main productivity techniques from this article? I want to be able to reference them later.

Extract the key productivity techniques from this article and format them as 5 numbered bullet points with the technique name and a brief explanation of how to implement it. I need this for quick reference during my workday.

responses.response_weak: I would be happy to summarize an article for you, but I do not see any article content in your message. Could you please share the article text or a link so I can help?
responses.response_medium:
I would be glad to pull out the main productivity techniques for you! However, I do not see the article content in your message. Could you paste the article text so I can summarize the key techniques?

Once you share it, I will identify the core productivity methods discussed and present them in a way that is easy to reference later.
responses.response_strong:
I am ready to extract the key productivity techniques for you! I do not see the article content in your message yet, but once you share it, here is exactly what I will deliver:

**Format:**
1. **[Technique Name]** — One-sentence explanation of how to implement it in your workday
2. **[Technique Name]** — One-sentence explanation of how to implement it in your workday
3. *(and so on, up to 5 techniques)*

Each point will be concise enough to scan in under 30 seconds so you can reference it quickly between tasks. Go ahead and paste the article whenever you are ready.

feedback.what_happened: All three prompts had the same problem — no article was included — but notice how differently the AI responded. The weak prompt got a basic 'I need the article' response. The medium prompt was better because it mentioned your goal (quick reference), so the AI could explain what it would do once you shared the content. The effective prompt was specific about format (5 numbered points) and purpose (workday reference), so the AI could show you exactly what the output would look like and confirm it matched your needs before you even shared the article.
feedback.principle: When you're specific about the format and context you need, AI can preview exactly what it will deliver and make sure it fits your situation.
feedback.tip: When asking for summaries or extracts, always specify the format you want (bullet points, numbered list, table) and mention how you'll use it (quick reference, presentation, study notes) — this helps the AI tailor the response to your actual needs.
